//: Dedicated tsconfig for overrides.ts — NON-COMPOSITE so the IDE can
traverse cross-package source imports into @sittir/codegen's DSL.
The package build (`tsgo -p tsconfig.json`) is unaffected; this file
only drives editor/LSP type-checking of overrides.ts so

compilerOptions.//types: tree-sitter-cli/dsl.d.ts pulls the ambient DSL (Rule, RuleOrLiteral, GrammarSchema, GrammarSymbols, RuleBuilder, seq/choice/prec/...) into overrides.ts — same mechanism codegen's tsconfig uses. Replaces the failing `/// <reference>` directive (TS2688 under this rootDir) and the hand-rolled `declare const seq/...` stubs.
